title: Full Fat Norwegian Yogurt Braise
description: A floral, glassy-jelly, midnight-craving Norwegian dish featuring full fat yogurt and braise, perfect for a cold winter night. This vegetarian-friendly recipe is a unique twist on traditional Norwegian cuisine.
instructions: Heat butter in a large Dutch oven over medium heat. Add the sliced onions and cook until they are softened and caramelized, stirring occasionally, about 20 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Season the beef with salt and pepper.
Add the seasoned beef to the pot and cook until it is browned on all sides.
Add the flour and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the red wine and beef stock, and bring to a boil.
Scrape up any browned bits from the bottom of the pot.
Add the thyme and cover the pot.
Transfer the pot to the preheated oven and braise for 2 hours, or until the beef is tender.
Remove the pot from the oven and stir in the full-fat yogurt.
Return the pot to the stovetop and simmer over low heat until the sauce has thickened to your liking.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh thyme if desired.
